Sultan 'Ali al-Mashadi

3 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Illuminated Folio from a Gulistan (Rose Garden) of Sa'di (c. 1213–1291)
by Sultan 'Ali al-Mashadi
Iran · calligraphy: c. 1475–1500; border: c. 1550 · Gum tempera, ink, gold, and silver on paper
Illuminated Folio (recto) from a Gulistan (Rose Garden) of Sa'di (c. 1213–1291)
by Sultan 'Ali al-Mashadi
Afghanistan, Herat, Timurid period (1370–1501) · c. 1475–1500; border: c. 1550 · Gum tempera, ink, gold, and silver on paper
Illuminated folio (verso) from a Gulistan (Rose Garden) of Sa'di (c. 1213–1291)
by Sultan 'Ali al-Mashadi
Iran · calligraphy: c. 1475–1500; border: c. 1550 · Gum tempera, ink, gold, and silver on paper
